case_title: GONZALES, CARLOS VS NAZ AUTO SERVICES

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NAZ AUTO SERVICES
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 28051, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
CERT MAIL SENT TO NASIR JAVARD AGT FOR SRVC NAZ AUTO SERVICES RETURNED SIGNED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $900.00 FILED BY GONZALES, CARLOS AS TO DEFENDANT NAZ AUTO SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-21-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONZALES, CARLOS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NAZ AUTO SERVICES JUDGMENT ORDERED IN FAVOR ON APP/DEFT AND AGAINST RESP/PLTF IN SCA 28051 ON 02/01/06. RESPONDENT DID NOT PRODUCE EVIDENCE OF NEGLIGENT WORKMANSHIP OR PARTS. EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONZALES, CARLOS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NAZ AUTO SERVICES $400.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $400.00, DEFT WAIVES DEFECTIVE CERTIFIED MAIL. IN LIEU OF PAYMENT AND AT THE ELECTION OF PLTF, THE DEFT MAY REDO ALL WORK CURRENTLY UNDER WARRANTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT NAZ AUTO SERVICES
